name: io.github.nirholas/pumpfun-claims-bot
title: PumpFun Claims Bot
description: MCP server for PumpFun on-chain intelligence — tokens, claims, holders, and bundles.

environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: GitHub personal access token — raises API rate limit from 60 to 5000 req/hr

environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_RPC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Solana RPC HTTP URL for on-chain queries (defaults to public mainnet)
